<?php /** * Validates http (HyperText Transfer Protocol) as defined by RFC 2616 */ class HTMLPurifier_URIScheme_http extends HTMLPurifier_URIScheme { /** * @type int */ public $default_port = 80; /** * @type bool */ public $browsable = true; /** * @type bool */ public $hierarchical = true; /** * @param HTMLPurifier_URI $uri * @param HTMLPurifier_Config $config * @param HTMLPurifier_Context $context * @return bool */ public function doValidate(&$uri, $config, $context) { $uri->userinfo = null; return true; } } // vim: et sw=4 sts=4
